caption: A camera pans through a residential interior, moving from a hallway into a bathroom. The scene begins in a hall with light-colored walls and a wooden door, showing a glimpse of a glass-enclosed shower and a bathtub. As the camera moves, it passes through a wooden doorway, revealing a bathroom with white tiled walls and floors. Inside the bathroom, a white bathtub is situated beneath a window with horizontal blinds, and a glass shower enclosure stands adjacent to it. The bathroom is equipped with silver fixtures, including a showerhead and a faucet. There are no people present in the scenes. The sequence transitions from a wide view of the hallway and entrance to a closer, more detailed perspective of the bathroom's interior, highlighting the clean, modern aesthetic of the space.
